messages.needGameInLibrary: Please add and select a game config in Game Library first.
messages.needSelectGame: Please select a game config first.
messages.needGameExePath: Please configure the game executable path in Game Settings first.
messages.runtimeScanFailed: Runtime scan failed. Please check Proton config in "Game Settings -> Runtime": {reason}
messages.noProton: No Wine/Proton versions detected. Please download one in "Settings -> Proton Management" before launching.
messages.noDxvk: No available DXVK detected (no local cache and not installed in current Prefix). Please download one in "Settings -> DXVK Management".
messages.protonNotConfigured: No Wine/Proton version selected for current game. Please configure it in "Game Settings -> Runtime".
messages.invalidProtonVersion: Configured Wine/Proton version does not exist: {wineVersionId}. Please reselect in "Game Settings -> Runtime".
messages.dxvkNotInstalledConfirm: DXVK is not installed in current Prefix. This may cause black screen, crashes, or launch failure for DirectX 11/12 games. Open "Game Settings -> Runtime" to install now?
messages.tosPrimary: This launcher is unofficial and not affiliated with game publishers. Running games under Linux/Wine/Proton may trigger anti-cheat and account penalties. Do you understand and accept this risk?
messages.tosSecondary: Please confirm again: continuing means you understand this is an unofficial approach and may cause account risk.
messages.protectionWarnMode:
Protection is in warning mode and will not block launch. Recommended actions:
- {missing}
messages.protectionRequired: Protection is not enabled; launch is blocked. Apply protection from "Download/Protection" menu.{missing}
messages.protectionCheckFailed: Failed to verify protection status, launch blocked: {error}
messages.openGameLogFailed: Failed to open game log window: {error}

reason.runtimeScanFailed: Runtime scan failed, please configure Proton first.
reason.noProton: Please download a Proton version here first.
reason.noDxvk: Please download a DXVK version here first.
reason.protonNotConfigured: Please select or download a Wine/Proton version here first.
reason.invalidProtonVersion: Current Wine/Proton config is invalid, please reselect.
reason.fixRuntime: Please fix runtime config first (Proton / DXVK).

gamelibrary.deleteConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This will remove all config files for this game and cannot be undone.
gamelibrary.noTemplates:
No templates found.
Place game config folders into the GameTemplates directory.
gamelibrary.importOverwriteMsg: Game "{name}" already exists. Overwrite existing config?

websites.title: Websites
websites.desc: Project links and official websites for all supported games (CN / Global).

gitee.name: SSMT4 Linux Gitee Mirror
gitee.desc: Project mirror repository when GitHub access is unstable

dataMirror.name: Data-parameters Gitee Mirror
dataMirror.desc: Resource mirror repository for GitHub sync failures

settings.datadir_hint: Application data directory (game downloads, Games folder, etc). Config files are always saved in ~/.config/ssmt4.
settings.cachedir_placeholder: Select or enter cache folder path
settings.github_token_placeholder: Optional: Token to increase API rate limit
settings.version_check_hint: Check remote version and changelog from GitHub first, automatically fall back to Gitee when GitHub is unavailable, and finally use bundled local files as the last fallback.
settings.version_not_loaded: Version info not loaded yet. Click "Check Updates".
settings.proton_tab_hint: Manage each Proton family independently (local/remote dropdowns)
settings.proton_local_remote_hint: This page manages Proton downloads and catalog only. Per-game runtime is configured in Game Settings.
settings.proton_no_local: No local version in this family
settings.proton_no_remote: No remote version in this family (try refresh remote)
settings.proton_missing_source_hint: No source configured for this family. Add one in the catalog editor below.
settings.proton_catalog_hint: Changes to families/sources take effect after saving, no code changes required.
settings.proton_detect_patterns: Detection rules, one per line (regex supported)

migoto.gameConfigHint: Select a game to configure its 3DMigoto paths, injection method, and advanced options. Each game's config is saved independently.
migoto.pathConfigHint: In most cases you only need to set the 3DMigoto data path. The app first treats that path as the actual deployed importer root; if it detects a separate importer subdirectory under it, it switches to that folder automatically. Override only when needed.
migoto.migotoPathHint: Actual deployed 3DMigoto path. The app prefers this directory directly; if it detects that this is a parent directory with a nested importer folder, it resolves to that nested folder automatically.
migoto.importerFolderPlaceholder: Leave empty for auto-detect (prefer the data path itself)
migoto.importerFolderHint: Root directory of the importer (e.g. WWMI, GIMI), containing d3dx.ini and configs.
migoto.d3dxIniPathHint: Path to the 3DMigoto core config file. Advanced users can specify a custom ini.
migoto.autoDerivedPending: Leave this empty for automatic mode. It will be derived once the data path is set.
migoto.importerSelectHint: Select the mod importer matching the current game.
migoto.importerLockedHint: This game is fixed to the {importer} importer and cannot be switched to a different type.
migoto.injectionHint: Hook injection has better compatibility; direct injection works when hook fails.
migoto.injectionLockedHint: {importer} is fixed to {mode}; this comes from the upstream importer and should not be changed.
migoto.enforceRenderingHint: Ensures texture_hash and track_texture_updates are correct to prevent mod failures.
migoto.muteWarningsHint: Hide non-critical warnings in the 3DMigoto console.
migoto.enableHuntingHint: For mod development/debugging — view and switch shaders in real time.
migoto.dumpShadersHint: Export shader HLSL/ASM to clipboard for mod development.
migoto.callsLoggingHint: Log D3D11 API calls for debugging (impacts performance).
migoto.debugLoggingHint: Output verbose debug information to log file.
migoto.processTimeoutHint: Maximum time to wait for the game process to start and window to appear.
migoto.unsafeModeHint: Skip DLL signature verification. Only enable if you trust all mod files.
migoto.unsafeModeWarn: ⚠ Unsafe mode enabled — DLL signature verification will be skipped.
migoto.wwmiConfigureGameHint: Automatically modify SQLite database and INI files for game compatibility.
migoto.wwmiUnlockFpsHint: Raise the frame rate limit to 120 FPS and lock the setting.
migoto.wwmiPerfTweaksHint: Disable ray tracing and other heavy features for better compatibility and FPS.
migoto.wwmiDisableWoundedFxHint: Remove the red screen border effect when wounded.
migoto.bridgeConfigHint: Control ssmt4-bridge.exe behavior, including process management, custom launch, and script hooks.
migoto.bridgeExeHint: Path to ssmt4-bridge.exe. Leave empty to use default location in app data directory.
migoto.startArgsPlaceholder: Leave empty for no extra args (e.g. -dx11 -windowed)
migoto.startArgsHint: Extra command-line arguments passed to the game executable, space-separated.
migoto.startArgsRequiredHint: Extra launch arguments, space-separated. The current importer will automatically append the required arguments: {args}.
migoto.processStartMethodHint: How the Bridge starts the game process. Native is usually fine.
migoto.processPriorityHint: Windows priority for the game process. Higher priority may improve frame stability.
migoto.dllInitDelayHint: Time to wait after DLL injection for initialization (ms). Increase if you encounter crashes.
migoto.customLaunchEnableHint: Use a custom command instead of the default game launch method.
migoto.customLaunchCmdHint: Command executed inside the Proton container. Paths are auto-converted to Wine format.
migoto.customLaunchInjectHint: DLL injection method used with custom launch.
migoto.scriptHooksHint: Run custom commands before/after game launch, useful for cache cleanup, save backups, etc.
migoto.preLaunchCmdPlaceholder: Command to run before game starts
migoto.preLaunchWaitHint: When enabled, waits for the command to finish before launching the game.
migoto.postLoadCmdPlaceholder: Command to run after DLL injection
migoto.postLoadWaitHint: When enabled, waits for the command to finish before continuing.
migoto.extraLibrariesEnableHint: Load additional dynamic libraries during DLL injection.
migoto.extraLibrariesPathsPlaceholder:
One Linux path per line, e.g.:
/home/user/libs/reshade.dll
/home/user/libs/custom.dll
migoto.extraLibrariesPathsHint: One Linux path per line, auto-converted to Wine paths at launch.
migoto.xxmiHint: Download 3DMigoto core libraries and game importer packages from XXMI project (SpectrumQT) GitHub Releases.
migoto.xxmiEmpty: Click "Refresh Versions" to fetch available XXMI resource package versions.
migoto.xxmiDeployNoTarget: Please configure the 3DMigoto data path first

resource.title: Resource Update
resource.sectionHint: Check Data-parameters via GitHub first; automatically fall back to the Gitee mirror when GitHub is unavailable, and pull updates with one click.
resource.notLoaded: Resource version info not loaded. Click "Check Resource Version".

snowbreakSourcePolicy.label: Snowbreak Source Policy
snowbreakSourcePolicy.officialFirst: Official first (fallback to community on failure)
snowbreakSourcePolicy.communityFirst: Community first (fallback to official on failure)
snowbreakSourcePolicy.hint: Recommended: keep "Official first". It auto-falls back when network issues occur.

logviewer.label: Log Viewer
logviewer.hint: View runtime logs in a separate window for troubleshooting and sharing with developers.

onboarding.label: Feature Onboarding
onboarding.hint: Only replays feature tour (Home, Library, Runtime, etc.) and does not reset initialization settings.

settings.dxvk_guide_hint: Download DXVK versions here, then apply them in "Game Settings -> Runtime".
settings.proton_guide_hint: Download and install at least one Proton version here before launching from Home.
settings.proton_editor_collapsed_hint: Catalog editor is collapsed (recommended for better scroll performance).

messages.protonRemoteFetchFailed: Failed to fetch remote Proton list: {error}
messages.dxvkFetchWarning: No remote versions fetched. Please retry later.

settings.dxvk_hint: Download and manage DXVK versions here, then install them into the game's Wine Prefix.
settings.dxvk_no_local: No local cached versions. Fetch available versions and download first.
settings.vkd3d_hint: Download and manage VKD3D-Proton versions here for Direct3D 12 translation.
settings.vkd3d_no_local: No local cached versions. Fetch available versions and download first.

gamesettingsmodal.title: Game Settings
gamesettingsmodal.resetconfirm_msg: Are you sure you want to reset to default settings? This will clear all custom configurations.
gamesettingsmodal.more_coming: More settings coming in future updates

createConfig.title: Confirm Creation

info.displayNamePlaceholder: Shown in UI, can differ from config name
info.runtimeWineHint: Run Windows games with Wine or Proton. Configure Wine version in Runtime tab.
info.runtimeSteamHint: Launch through Steam and use Steam built-in Proton compatibility layer.
info.runtimeLinuxHint: Run in native Linux mode without a compatibility layer.
info.capabilityLimitedHint: This preset currently has limited download capability. Editing remains available.
info.readonlyWarning: Config is in legacy read-only fallback mode ({code}). Check migration logs.
info.unsavedPrompt: There are unsaved changes in Game Info. Close anyway?
info.unsavedSwitchPrompt: There are unsaved changes in Game Info. Switching games will discard them. Continue?
info.readonlyBanner: Game Info is currently in read-only display mode (only background assets can be modified).

migoto.enabledHint: When enabled, the game launches through the 3DMigoto bridge for automatic mod injection.
migoto.disabledHint: 3DMigoto is currently disabled. The game will launch in normal mode.
migoto.importerHint: Select the mod importer matching your game.
migoto.injectionHint: Hook injection has better compatibility; direct injection works when hook fails.
migoto.enforceRenderingHint: Ensures texture_hash and track_texture_updates are correct to prevent mod failures.
migoto.enableHuntingHint: For mod development/debugging — view and switch shaders in real time.
migoto.dumpShadersHint: Export shader HLSL/ASM to clipboard for mod development.
migoto.muteWarningsHint: Hide non-critical warnings in the 3DMigoto console.
migoto.callsLoggingHint: Log D3D11 API calls for debugging (impacts performance).
migoto.debugLoggingHint: Output verbose debug information to log file.
migoto.unsafeModeHint: Skip DLL signature verification. Only enable if you trust all mod files.
migoto.unsafeModeWarn: ⚠ Unsafe mode enabled — DLL signature verification will be skipped.
migoto.processTimeoutHint: Maximum time to wait for the game process to start and window to appear.

wwmi.title: Wuthering Waves (WWMI) Settings
wwmi.configureGameHint: Automatically modify SQLite database and INI files for game compatibility.
wwmi.unlockFpsHint: Raise the frame rate limit to 120 FPS and lock the setting.
wwmi.perfTweaksHint: Disable ray tracing and other heavy features for better compatibility and FPS.
wwmi.disableWoundedFxHint: Remove the red screen border effect when wounded.

migoto.gotoSettingsHint: For detailed 3DMigoto settings (path, injection mode, Mod folder, etc.), go to Settings -> 3DMIGOTO Management.

gameTab.jadeiteHint: Jadeite is used on Linux to bypass HoYoverse anti-cheat. The game is launched through jadeite.exe automatically.
gameTab.workingDirPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the executable directory

messages.deleteConfirm: Delete configuration "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
messages.dxvkUninstallConfirm: Uninstall DXVK from the current Prefix?
messages.restoreSuccess: Icon and background restored to default
messages.runtimeAttentionDefault: Please configure runtime options here first (Proton / DXVK / VKD3D).
messages.vkd3dUninstallConfirm: Uninstall VKD3D from the current Prefix?

runtimeTab.dxvkHint: To download more DXVK versions, go to "Settings -> DXVK Management".
runtimeTab.noLocalVkd3d: No local VKD3D cache found. Download one in "Settings -> VKD3D Management" before applying.
runtimeTab.protonHint: To download more Proton versions, go to "Settings -> Proton Management".
runtimeTab.selectLocalDxvk: Select a locally cached DXVK version...
runtimeTab.selectLocalVkd3d: Select a locally cached VKD3D version...
runtimeTab.useUmuRun: Launch with umu-run (enabled by default for Wuthering Waves)
runtimeTab.vkd3dOptionalHint: VKD3D is optional by default; enable it when D3D12 translation is required.

systemTab.gpuNoNeed: Multiple GPUs were not detected; manual selection is not required.
systemTab.langHint: Sets the LANG environment variable; some games switch language automatically based on this value.

mods.title: Mod Manager
mods.descAdvanced: Manage 3DMigoto mods per game. You can choose a game, inspect active directories, enable or disable mods individually or in bulk, and quickly open the Mod / ShaderFixes folders.
mods.folderMissing: Folder does not exist yet. It will be created when opened.
mods.noSelectedState: Unable to read mod state for the selected game.
mods.noMods: No manageable entries were found in this game's Mod folder yet. Open the folder and add your mods first.
mods.noModsFiltered: No mods match the current filters.
mods.scanFailed: Failed to read the current game's mod list: {error}
mods.loadFailed: Failed to load Mod Manager data: {error}
mods.pathMissing: No valid directory path is currently available.
mods.enabledGame: 3DMigoto / mod support has been enabled for this game
mods.disabledGame: 3DMigoto / mod support has been disabled for this game
mods.modEnabled: The mod has been enabled and will be loaded
mods.modDisabled: The mod has been disabled and will no longer be loaded
mods.bulkSkipped: The following entries were skipped because of name conflicts

setup.welcomeHint: First-time setup is simple and takes only two steps.
setup.dataDirDesc: SSMT4 needs a directory to store all data, including:
setup.riskDesc: This tool is an unofficial Linux launcher. Please read and confirm the following before continuing:

riskItems.unofficial: This tool is not affiliated with the game publishers and has no official warranty.
riskItems.anticheat: Running games under Wine/Proton may be flagged by anti-cheat systems.
riskItems.account: You are responsible for potential risks, including account penalties.
riskItems.confirm: Continue only if you understand and accept these risks.

riskChecks.unofficial: I understand this is an unofficial tool
riskChecks.account: I understand and accept potential account risks

fallback.localMissing: Local Wiki docs are not included in this package.
fallback.openWikiHint: Click "Open GitHub Wiki" in a networked environment to view latest content.

homeStart.title: Home Launch Area
homeStart.desc: This is the main launch button. If executable is configured, launch directly; otherwise it shows "Download Game".
homeStart.hint: Confirm the selected game first, then click launch.

homeDownload.title: Download / Install Game
homeDownload.desc: In the download window, focus on three things: state card (install/update), install directory, and main action buttons (download/verify/protection).
homeDownload.hint: Recommended order: confirm state and directory first, then start download; run verify once after install.

homeSettings.title: Home Quick Settings
homeSettings.desc: The gear menu on the right opens "Game Settings" and "Download/Protection" quickly.
homeSettings.hint: If launch fails, start runtime checks from here first.

library.title: Game Library
library.desc: Import configs, search games, and manage sidebar visibility here.
library.hint: Right-click a game item for show/hide/delete actions.

gameSettingsInfo.title: Game Info
gameSettingsInfo.desc: Manage config name, display name, version detection, preset, and icon/background assets.
gameSettingsInfo.hint: Confirm preset and display name first, then adjust assets.

gameSettingsGame.title: Game Options
gameSettingsGame.desc: Critical launch settings: executable path, launch args, working directory, Prefix status, and Jadeite status for HoYoverse games.
gameSettingsGame.hint: Executable path is the most critical field.

gameSettingsRuntime.title: Runtime
gameSettingsRuntime.desc: Check three layers: Wine/Proton version, DXVK status, VKD3D status, then save at the bottom.
gameSettingsRuntime.hint: For black screen or instant exit, verify these three first.

gameSettingsRuntimeVkd3d.title: Runtime - VKD3D
gameSettingsRuntimeVkd3d.desc: VKD3D is for D3D12 translation and is optional by default.
gameSettingsRuntimeVkd3d.hint: D3D11 games usually prioritize DXVK; check VKD3D for D3D12 issues.

gameSettingsSystem.title: System Options
gameSettingsSystem.desc: Tune GPU selection, game language, and sandbox policy for compatibility and stability.
gameSettingsSystem.hint: On dual-GPU devices, pin GPU here first and observe stability.

settingsMenu.title: Settings Navigation
settingsMenu.desc: Left panel covers basic settings, display options, version checks, resource updates, and runtime component management.
settingsMenu.hint: Complete basic settings first, then install Proton/DXVK/VKD3D.

settingsBasic.title: Basic Settings
settingsBasic.desc: Includes language, data dir, cache dir, download source strategy, and log viewer entry.
settingsBasic.hint: Confirm dataDir and cacheDir early to avoid path confusion.

settingsDisplay.title: Display Settings
settingsDisplay.desc: Control visibility of "Websites / Documents" in the top navigation.
settingsDisplay.hint: Enable only what you need to reduce home-page clutter.

settingsVersion.title: Version Check
settingsVersion.desc: Reads local/latest version info and shows changelog.
settingsVersion.hint: When behavior differs, verify everyone is on the same version first.

settingsResource.title: Resource Update
settingsResource.desc: Syncs Data-parameters, affecting presets, download parameters, and detection rules.
settingsResource.hint: If support list or detection looks wrong, run resource update first.

settingsProton.title: Proton Management
settingsProton.desc: Manage local Wine/Proton versions and remote downloads.
settingsProton.hint: If you see "Missing Proton", download at least one version here.

settingsDxvk.title: DXVK Management
settingsDxvk.desc: Download and manage DXVK versions for Prefix installation/switching.
settingsDxvk.hint: If you see "Missing DXVK", download here first and apply in game settings.

settingsVkd3d.title: VKD3D Management
settingsVkd3d.desc: Manage VKD3D-Proton downloads and cache for D3D12 translation.
settingsVkd3d.hint: Download here first, then apply in game runtime settings.

channel.initHint: Currently in initialization mode. After first initialization, manually switch to online mode (205).
channel.title: Channel Mode
channel.unknownHint: Current channel value is unrecognized (neither 19 nor 205). Reapply the current mode.

installDir.gameHint: Game files will be downloaded here. Ensure enough disk space (about 130GB+).
installDir.installerHint: Official launcher installer will be downloaded here and the game path will be configured automatically (can be changed later).
installDir.label: Install Directory

language.label: Voice Packs (multi-select)
language.noneSelectedHint: ⚠ No voice pack selected; character voices will be unavailable

manual.hint: If the game is already installed (via Steam, Lutris, or manual install), just select the executable.
manual.notSupported: This game does not support automatic download yet.

messages.bizPrefixMissing: The current HoYoverse server is missing biz_prefix. Please check the game preset configuration.
messages.disableProtectionConfirm: Disabling protection restores original channel parameters and may increase account risk. Continue?
messages.needGameFolder: Please select a game install directory first
messages.needLauncherAndFolder: Please configure launcher API and game install directory first
messages.needSourceAndFolderForDownload: Please configure download source and install directory before downloading.
messages.needSourceAndFolderForRepair: Please configure download source and install directory before repairing.
messages.needSourceAndFolderForVerify: Please configure download source and install directory before verifying.
messages.noRepairableFiles: No repairable files found. Run a verify pass first.
messages.noTaskToResume: No paused download task to resume.
messages.protectionPartial:
Protection was only partially applied. Remaining issues:
{missing}
messages.repairUnsupported: This game does not support single-file repair from a failure list yet.
messages.taskRunning: A download/verify task is already running. Please wait.
messages.taskRunningAny: A download/verify/repair task is already running. Please wait.
messages.tosPrimary:
This launcher is an unofficial tool and is not affiliated with the game publisher.

Running games on Linux/Wine/Proton may be flagged by anti-cheat and can lead to account penalties (including bans).

Do you understand and accept this risk?
messages.tosSecondary: Please confirm again: continuing means you understand this is unofficial and may carry account risk.

progress.waiting: Task started, waiting for progress data...

protection.none: No protections available for this game
protection.title: Game Protection

state.networkError: ⚠ Network error, please check your connection
